name: Suite Combined Fresh+100 — 60 fresh-all + 100 sampled from realistic-01..08
description: 60 fresh-all cases (every documented capability) PLUS 100 cases sampled across 5 realistic-suite files (RE=easy, RM=medium, RH=hard, RT=time-analytics, RU=user-workload). Tests both VQ catalog generalization and the 10 new fixes from 2026-05-18. Total: 160 cases.

Scenarios.Question: give me every ticket number
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: pull all user email addresses
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: display each user's username together with their email
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: show me critical priority tickets only
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list tickets that are both open and critical
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose priority is either critical or high
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('Critical','High') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets opened during the past 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: which tickets have already been resolved
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, ResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose title mentions login
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.Title LIKE '%login%' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: most recent 5 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: number of active users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: total ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: all distinct ticket statuses
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM TicketStatuses

Scenarios.Question: mean ticket resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: date of the most recently resolved ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(ResolvedAt) AS LatestResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: oldest ticket created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(CreatedAt) AS EarliestCreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets per status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets grouped by status and priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name, p.Name ORDER BY Status, Priority

Scenarios.Question: top 5 users by tickets they created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketsCreated FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketsCreated DESC

Scenarios.Question: each ticket together with its priority name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with their entity, status and priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, e.Name AS Entity, s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users that have never opened a single ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: with a cte show daily ticket counts for the last 14 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH DailyCounts AS (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) SELECT Day, Count FROM DailyCounts ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: with two ctes compute monthly counts then keep only months above 30 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH MonthlyCounts AS (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')), Filtered AS (SELECT Month, Count FROM MonthlyCounts WHERE Count > 30) SELECT Month, Count FROM Filtered ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: use ctes to rank entities by ticket volume keeping top 3
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH EntityCounts AS (SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name), Ranked AS (SELECT Name, Count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY Count DESC) AS Rank FROM EntityCounts) SELECT Name, Count, Rank FROM Ranked WHERE Rank <= 3 ORDER BY Rank

Scenarios.Question: rank entities by their ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.Id) DESC) AS Rank FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Rank

Scenarios.Question: row number for tickets ordered by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, CreatedAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CreatedAt) AS RowNum FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt

Scenarios.Question: rank tickets within each entity by creation date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, e.Name AS Entity, t.CreatedAt, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY t.EntityId ORDER BY t.CreatedAt) AS Rank FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY Entity, Rank

Scenarios.Question: month over month change in ticket creation using lag
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, Count, Count - LAG(Count) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS Delta FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: rolling 7 day average of tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Day, Count, AVG(CAST(Count AS FLOAT)) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS Rolling7DayAvg FROM (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-90,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) d ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: running monthly cumulative ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, MonthlyCount, SUM(MonthlyCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CumulativeCount FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS MonthlyCount FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: median ticket resolution time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS MedianDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: 95th percentile of ticket resolution time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS P95Days FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: compare last 7 days vs the previous 7 days for tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Last7Days, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND CreatedAt < DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Previous7Days FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created this month versus last month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())),1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets resolved this year versus last year
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: compare current quarter vs last quarter ticket counts
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(QUARTER, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisQuarter, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(QUARTER, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastQuarter FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets per day for the last 14 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: monthly ticket trend over the last 6 months
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(MONTH,-6,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: this month resolution rate
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND ResolvedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS DECIMAL(6,2)) AS ResolutionRatePct FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: percent of unassigned tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN AssignedToUserId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS DECIMAL(6,2)) AS UnassignedPct FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: busiest day of the last 30 days for ticket creation
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 1 CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-30,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY AvgResolutionDays DESC

Scenarios.Question: statuses with more than 50 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: age in days for every ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS AgeDays FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: open tickets older than 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt, DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS AgeDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) > 30 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: all descendant tickets of TCK-2026-00072
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH TicketTree AS (SELECT Id, TicketNumber, Title, ParentTicketId, 0 AS Depth FROM Tickets WHERE TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-00072' AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.ParentTicketId, tt.Depth + 1 FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketTree tt ON t.ParentTicketId = tt.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0) SELECT TicketNumber, Title, Depth FROM TicketTree WHERE Depth > 0 ORDER BY Depth, TicketNumber

Scenarios.Question: ancestor chain of ticket TCK-2026-00072
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH ParentChain AS (SELECT Id, TicketNumber, Title, ParentTicketId, 0 AS DistanceFromStart FROM Tickets WHERE TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-00072' AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.ParentTicketId, pc.DistanceFromStart + 1 FROM Tickets t JOIN ParentChain pc ON t.Id = pc.ParentTicketId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0) SELECT TicketNumber, Title, DistanceFromStart FROM ParentChain ORDER BY DistanceFromStart

Scenarios.Question: hi
thanks a lot
help me please
see you soon
what is priority
drop the users table
احذف جميع التذاكر
اعرض التذاكر المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tikets are open
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created on date 1900-01-01
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE CAST(t.CreatedAt AS DATE) = '1900-01-01' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tell me about Egypt
convert 100 USD to JPY
How many tickets do we have in total?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many open tickets do we have right now?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS OpenTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me all unassigned tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.AssignedToUserId IS NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created today?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Today FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created yesterday?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Yesterday FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()) AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many closed tickets do we have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Closed FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Closed' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets does each priority have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me all critical tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many active users do we have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ActiveUsers FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: How many active entities do we have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ActiveEntities FROM Entitys WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets came in through email?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS EmailTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources s ON s.Id = t.SourceId WHERE s.Name = 'Email' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me the 10 newest tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were resolved this month?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ResolvedThisMonth FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(ResolvedAt) = MONTH(GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets have their SLA breached?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Breached FROM Tickets WHERE IsSlaBreached = 1 AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets created in the last 7 days.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -7, GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Find tickets whose title contains 'login'.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.Title LIKE '%login%' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many rejected tickets are there?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Rejected FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Rejected' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets are currently still open (not closed yet)?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS StillOpen FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets have been escalated?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Escalated FROM Tickets WHERE EscalatedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many comments are there across all tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalComments FROM TicketComments

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets does each entity have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: Break down ticket counts by status.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets came from each source?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources s ON s.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: What are the top 5 ticket categories by volume?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets did Sara Hassan create?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS SaraTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE u.FirstName = 'Sara' AND u.LastName = 'Hassan' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets has Lina Mansour resolved?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS LinaResolved FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.ResolvedByUserId WHERE u.FirstName = 'Lina' AND u.LastName = 'Mansour' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets created by users from the Finance entity.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS CreatedBy FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId WHERE e.Name = 'Finance' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: List all the support agents we have.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS Name, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name IN ('SupportAgent', 'Support Agent') AND u.IsActive = 1 ORDER BY u.FirstName, u.LastName

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets do we have per priority?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in April 2026?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS AprilTickets FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = 2026 AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = 4 AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me all tickets that have been escalated.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.EscalationLevel, t.EscalatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.EscalatedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.EscalatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets assigned to Tariq Hamdan.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE u.FirstName = 'Tariq' AND u.LastName = 'Hamdan' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created this week?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ThisWeek FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -DATEPART(weekday, GETDATE()) + 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets came from the Mobile App?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS MobileTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources s ON s.Id = t.SourceId WHERE s.Name = 'Mobile App' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Tickets per entity — show entity name and ticket count.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many high and critical priority tickets are there?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS HighOrCritical FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('High', 'Critical') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets is each agent currently handling?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.Email AS Agent, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.Email ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets are not yet resolved?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Unresolved FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created by Health entity users?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS HealthCreated FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId WHERE e.Name = 'Health' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many attachments are stored in total?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalAttachments FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: List the top 10 most active end-users by tickets created.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS UserName, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.FirstName, u.LastName ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me hardware-related tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE c.Name = 'Hardware' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets does the Operations entity have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS OperationsTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE e.Name = 'Operations' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me all pending tickets and the reason they're pending.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.PendingReason FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Pending' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were resolved by support agents?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.Id) AS ResolvedByAgents FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.ResolvedByUserId JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name IN ('SupportAgent', 'Support Agent') AND t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket counts between this month and last month.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'ThisMonth' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = MONTH(GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'LastMonth', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = MONTH(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket volume this year versus last year.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'CurrentYear' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'LastYear', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets per user — full name, their entity, and the number of tickets they created.
Scenarios.Category: Hard / Tickets per user with entity
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS UserName, e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId LEFT JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.FirstName, u.LastName, e.Name ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: For each agent, show the number of tickets assigned and average resolution time in hours.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS Agent, COUNT(*) AS Assigned, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionHours FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.FirstName, u.LastName ORDER BY Assigned DESC

Scenarios.Question: Which tickets have no comments yet?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN TicketComments c ON c.TicketId = t.Id WHERE c.Id IS NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Which users haven't created any tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.Id, u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id WHERE t.Id IS NULL

Scenarios.Question: What is the average resolution time in hours for resolved tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Who are the top 5 users by tickets created?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS UserName, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.FirstName, u.LastName ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: Who are the top 5 agents by tickets resolved?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS Agent, COUNT(*) AS Resolved FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.ResolvedByUserId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.FirstName, u.LastName ORDER BY Resolved DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets that breached their SLA along with their priority and who created them.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, p.Name AS Priority, u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS CreatedBy FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsSlaBreached = 1 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Which categories have more than 15 tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 15 ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: Which entities have more than 10 tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets that took more than 24 hours to resolve.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS Hours FROM Tickets t WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) > 24 AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY Hours DESC

Scenarios.Question: Which 10 tickets have the most comments?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, COUNT(c.Id) AS Comments FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketComments c ON c.TicketId = t.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title ORDER BY Comments DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show pending tickets along with their pending reason.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.PendingReason FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Pending' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: List all end-users with their entity name.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS UserName, e.Name AS Entity FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name = 'EndUser' AND u.IsActive = 1 ORDER BY e.Name, u.FirstName

Scenarios.Question: Show escalated tickets with the escalation level and who they were escalated to.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.EscalationLevel, u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS EscalatedTo FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.EscalatedToUserId WHERE t.EscalatedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many closed tickets does each category have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS ClosedTotal FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Closed' AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY ClosedTotal DESC

Scenarios.Question: Which 10 tickets took the longest to resolve?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS Hours FROM Tickets t WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY Hours DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show child tickets with their parent ticket number and title.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id AS ChildId, t.TicketNumber AS ChildNumber, t.Title AS ChildTitle, p.TicketNumber AS ParentNumber, p.Title AS ParentTitle FROM Tickets t JOIN Tickets p ON p.Id = t.ParentTicketId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created today?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created yesterday?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()) AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in the last 7 days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-7,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in the last 30 days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-30,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created this month?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created last month?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket counts this month vs last month.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket counts this year vs last year.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per month for the last 6 months.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt,'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(month,-6,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt,'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per day for the last 14 days.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-14,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per week for the last 8 weeks.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DATEPART(year,CreatedAt) AS Yr, DATEPART(iso_week,CreatedAt) AS Wk, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(week,-8,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY DATEPART(year,CreatedAt), DATEPART(iso_week,CreatedAt) ORDER BY Yr, Wk

Scenarios.Question: What is the average age of open tickets in days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgAgeDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show the 10 oldest open tickets.
Scenarios.Category: TOP N oldest by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in April 2026?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= '2026-04-01' AND CreatedAt < '2026-05-01' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: What is the average resolution time in hours?
Scenarios.Category: AVG over DATEDIFF between two date columns
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: What is the average first response time in hours?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, FirstRespondedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets WHERE FirstRespondedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were resolved today?
Scenarios.Category: Date filter on a different date column
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(ResolvedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many open tickets are aged 0-1 day, 2-7 days, 8-30 days, and over 30 days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) <= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Days_0_1, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 2 AND 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Days_2_7, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Days_8_30, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Over_30 FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show the top 10 users by number of tickets created.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 u.UserName, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show the top 10 assignees by number of tickets assigned to them.
Scenarios.Category: TOP N + GROUP BY + COUNT on different FK
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 u.UserName, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON t.AssignedToUserId = u.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show the top 10 users by number of tickets they have resolved.
Scenarios.Category: TOP N on ResolvedByUserId with IS NOT NULL
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 u.UserName, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON t.ResolvedByUserId = u.Id WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets are unassigned?
Scenarios.Category: COUNT with IS NULL on FK
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE AssignedToUserId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: List unassigned tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE AssignedToUserId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: List users who have not created any tickets.
Scenarios.Category: Anti-join — users with no tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: What is the average number of tickets per creator?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(Cnt AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgTicketsPerUser FROM (SELECT CreatedByUserId, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CreatedByUserId) x

Scenarios.Question: Show users with their roles.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS Role FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: How many users are in each role?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.Name AS Role, COUNT(*) AS UserCount FROM AspNetUserRoles ur JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId GROUP BY r.Name ORDER BY UserCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Which users have created more than 5 tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show tickets with their assignee username and email.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, u.UserName, u.Email FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show average resolution time in hours per resolver.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.ResolvedByUserId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY AvgHours ASC

Scenarios.Question: How many open tickets does each assignee currently have?
Scenarios.Category: GROUP BY assignee + filter on status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, COUNT(*) AS OpenCount FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY OpenCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: List inactive users.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many active users are there?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: For each user, show how many tickets they created and how many they resolved.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, SUM(CASE WHEN t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Created, SUM(CASE WHEN t.ResolvedByUserId = u.Id AND t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Resolved FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON (t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id OR t.ResolvedByUserId = u.Id) AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY Created DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many users belong to each entity?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS UserCount FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY UserCount DESC
